Table of Contents

Class ClienteService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for client lifecycle management.

public class ClienteService
Inheritance
object
ClienteService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Coordinates client registration, membership changes, status transitions, and facility check-in. Multi-step write operations are executed inside IUnitOfWork transactions. All operations are audited via BitacoraService.

Constructors

ClienteService()

Initializes all dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public ClienteService()

Methods

ActualizarMembresia(Guid, Guid)

Switches a client's active membership to a new plan within a transaction. Closes the current ClienteMembresia record, creates a new one, and inserts a DeudaMembresia movement for the new plan's price.

public void ActualizarMembresia(Guid clienteId, Guid nuevaMembresiaId)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client to update.

nuevaMembresiaId Guid

The new membership plan to assign.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the client has an outstanding negative balance.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the client has a negative balance, or the membership is inactive.

DeshabilitarCliente(Guid, string)

Sets the client status to Inactivo and records the reason.

public void DeshabilitarCliente(Guid clienteId, string razon)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client to disable.

razon string

Mandatory reason for disabling; must not be null or whitespace.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown when razon is empty.

ArgumentException

Thrown if razon is empty.

HabilitarCliente(Guid)

Sets the client status to Activo and clears the previously recorded reason.

public void HabilitarCliente(Guid clienteId)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client to re-enable.

ListarClientes()

Returns all clients with their current balance, membership detail, and next payment date hydrated.

public List<ClienteDTO> ListarClientes()

Returns

List<ClienteDTO>

ObtenerCliente(Guid)

Returns a single client by primary key with balance and membership detail hydrated.

public ClienteDTO ObtenerCliente(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

The client's unique identifier.

Returns

ClienteDTO

The hydrated ClienteDTO, or null if not found.

ObtenerClientePorDNI(int)

Returns a single client by DNI with balance and membership detail hydrated.

public ClienteDTO ObtenerClientePorDNI(int dni)

Parameters

dni int

The client's national identity number.

Returns

ClienteDTO

The hydrated ClienteDTO, or null if not found.

RegistrarCliente(ClienteDTO)

Registers a new client. If a membership is specified, creates the client-membership record and inserts an initial DeudaMembresia movement in the same transaction.

public void RegistrarCliente(ClienteDTO dto)

Parameters

dto ClienteDTO

Client data including optional MembresiaID.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid field values (DNI, name, email format, future birth date).

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the DNI is already registered or the membership is inactive.

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid field values.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown if the DNI already exists or the membership is inactive.

ValidarIngreso(int)

Validates whether a client may enter the facility and, if so, records the check-in. Access is denied when the client is inactive or has a negative balance.

public ResultadoIngresoDTO ValidarIngreso(int dni)

Parameters

dni int

The client's DNI to look up.

Returns

ResultadoIngresoDTO

A ResultadoIngresoDTO with Permitido = true on success, or Permitido = false with a reason string when access is denied.
